# Getting Started

Welcome to the project. This guide will help you get started.

## Installation

Run the following command:

```bash
npm install @jay-framework/markdown
```

## Usage

Here's a simple example:

```typescript
const hello = 'world';
console.log(hello);
```

> Note: Make sure you have Node.js 20+ installed.

## Features

- **Fast** rendering
- **Lightweight** parser
- Code highlighting
